task_snapshots.title: 504c — PR Size Governor (Max 400 Lines)
task_snapshots.description:
# 504c — PR Size Governor (Max 400 Lines)
**Role:** backend **Priority:** 1 **Scope:** small

Auto-split large agent PRs into reviewable chunks. Max 400 lines per PR. Dependency ordering between split PRs. Addresses 'the bottleneck is verification' (Addy Osmani).
